_info.text: Configure how often the adapter should fetch new Formula 1 data from the OpenF1 API.

updateInterval.label: Update Interval (seconds)
updateInterval.help: How often to fetch new data from the API (minimum 30 seconds)

favoriteDriver.label: Favorite Driver
favoriteDriver.help: Your favorite driver (will be highlighted in future widgets)

favoriteTeam.label: Favorite Team
favoriteTeam.help: Your favorite team (will be highlighted in future widgets)
